businessContext_i18n.fr: Capital total disponible pour le trading

inputs.label: Risk Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Maximum percentage of account to risk per trade

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum percentage of account to risk per trade
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına riske atılacak maksimum hesap yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Prozentsatz des Kontos, der pro Trade riskiert wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage maximum du compte à risquer par transaction
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje máximo de la cuenta a arriesgar por operación
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى لنسبة الحساب التي يمكن المخاطرة بها لكل صفقة

inputs.label: Entry Price
inputs.businessContext: Price at which the trade is entered

businessContext_i18n.en: Price at which the trade is entered
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis, zu dem der Trade eingegangen wird
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio al que se ingresa la operación
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر الذي يتم به الدخول في الصفقة

inputs.label: Stop Loss Price
inputs.businessContext: Price at which the trade will be exited to limit loss

businessContext_i18n.en: Price at which the trade will be exited to limit loss
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zararı sınırlamak için işlemden çıkılacak fiyat
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis, zu dem der Trade zur Verlustbegrenzung beendet wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix auquel la transaction sera clôturée pour limiter les pertes
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio al que se saldrá de la operación para limitar la pérdida
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر الذي سيتم عنده الخروج من الصفقة للحد من الخسارة
